column.name: pace_ref_distance_m
column.remarks: Reference race distance in meters for pace zone calculation

column.name: pace_ref_time_seconds
column.remarks: Reference race time in seconds for pace zone calculation

column.name: pace_ref_label
column.remarks: Human-readable label for the reference race (e.g. 10K, Halbmarathon)

column.name: threshold_pace_sec_per_km
column.remarks: Calculated lactate threshold pace in seconds per km
